title: DSCI Notification 2026 - Walk-in interview for 36 Senior Resident Posts
description: The Delhi State Cancer Institute (DSCI) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 36 Senior Resident Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their MBBS, Post-graduation, Diploma, MD/MS, DNB, BDS, MDS can apply for the DSCI Notification 2026. The interested applicants can attend the walk-in interview.
